text:
Clotted cream or thick jersey cream

Preheat the oven to 200 c. First make the topping:put the flour and butter into a bowl and rub together with your fingers to a breadcrumb-like consistency. Stir in the brown sugar, then mix in the oats and cobnuts. Spread out on a baking tray.

Halve the plums, place cut side up on another baking tray and sprinkle with the caster sugar

Place both or the trays in the oven and bake for 15-20 minutes until the plums are lightly coloured and softened and the topping 1s golden; you may need to take the toppingout before the plums

Leave the plums to cool slightly, then transfer them to individual serving bowls and spoon over the cooking juices.scatter over the cobnut topping and top with a generous dollop of cream
